subcodes.first_line: O thou exalted offshoot of the divine Tree! What thou didst write was received and perused. Render thanks unto God that thou wert commissioned… Although at present the horizon of the world of humanity is darkened with turmoil, its foundation shaken to its core
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع الرفیع من السدره الرحمانیه آنچه نگاشتید معلوم و واضح شد حمد خدا را
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
